test.name: Planning which volumes to browse should not trigger search-images
test.description: User asks which unindexed volumes to browse next and to help plan — that's research-plan. search-images executes a browse of a specific volume; it does not decide research strategy.

input.user_message: Which unindexed record sets should I browse next for the Flynn research? Help me plan the strategy.

negative.explanation: Deciding which record sets to browse and in what order is planning work — research-plan's job. search-images executes a browse of an already-chosen volume; it does not author or prioritize plan items.

judge_context: Should route to research-plan rather than browsing — the user is asking what to search, not asking to execute a specific browse.
